key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision RESULT - Fed holds 3.5-3.75% (8-4 dissent; last 4 dissenters: Oct 1992)
key_events_next_24h.note: COMPLETED. Unusual 4-member dissent increases uncertainty. Powell's last meeting as Chair. Warsh nomination advancing. Historical: BTC drops after 8 of last 9 FOMC meetings within 48h.

key_events_next_24h.name: Powell Press Conference (Final as Fed Chair)
key_events_next_24h.note: COMPLETED. Post-conference reaction ongoing. Hawkish undertone expected given Hormuz oil pressure and 4 dissenters. Watch for BTC reaction below $76K.

key_events_next_24h.name: US GDP Q1 2026 Advance Estimate (BEA)
key_events_next_24h.note: Atlanta Fed GDPNow nowcast: ~1.2% vs consensus 2.5-3.0%. Weak print = stagflation signal = bearish for risk assets.

key_events_next_24h.name: SEC Chair Atkins speech at Bitcoin 2026 conference (Las Vegas)
key_events_next_24h.note: First major public speech on digital asset regulation, custody, exchange oversight. Positive tone expected (Atkins is pro-crypto).

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report
key_events_next_24h.note: Three consecutive outflow days feared: Apr 27 $263.2M, Apr 28 $89.7M outflows. Continuation would confirm institutional retreat.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran / Hormuz Blockade (Ongoing)
key_events_next_24h.note: Brent >$104/barrel. No resolution imminent. Trump prepping 'lengthy Hormuz block'. Sustained oil pressure keeps inflation elevated.

key_events_next_24h.name: SEC 85-item NYSE Arca ETF listing rule (comment period)

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$77,161 as of Apr 29 ~09:30 ET. Rose briefly to $77,000 ahead of FOMC. Repeatedly rejected at $80K resistance. Support ~$75,000. Volume declining since Feb highs — fragile recovery.
sentiment_key_signals: FOMC RESULT: Held 3.5-3.75%; unusual 8-4 split (last 4-dissenter vote: Oct 1992) — uncertainty elevated
Powell's final press conference as Chair — Warsh nomination advancing, policy shift risk ahead
Historical: BTC dropped after 8 of last 9 FOMC meetings within 48h — bearish pattern
BTC twice rejected at $80K resistance — technical ceiling intact
Spot BTC ETF outflows: $89.7M Apr 28 + $263.2M Apr 27 — two consecutive outflow days
Negative Coinbase premium index — weakening US demand signal
BTC trading volume falling fast (Glassnode) — low-depth, high-sensitivity environment
BVIV implied vol at 3-month lows <42% annualized — market positioned for calm (can amplify moves)
Brent crude >$104/barrel (Hormuz restrictions) — inflation pressure sustained
GDP Q1 2026 advance estimate Apr 30 12:30 UTC — Atlanta Fed nowcast ~1.2% (well below 2.5-3% consensus)
SEC Chair Atkins speech at Bitcoin 2026 tonight — potentially positive for crypto regulation sentiment
7-day ETF flow still net positive (+3,725 BTC) — longer-term institutional demand intact
analysis.macro_backdrop: Post-FOMC: Fed held rates at 3.5-3.75% with 8-4 dissent — most divided vote since Oct 1992. Powell's last meeting as Chair adds transition uncertainty. Oil >$104 (Hormuz) keeps inflation pressure elevated. GDP Q1 advance estimate tomorrow (Apr 30 12:30 UTC) expected weak (~1.2% nowcast vs 2.5-3% consensus) — stagflation signal bearish for risk. ETF outflows for two consecutive days and $80K double rejection reinforce bearish short-term bias.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bearish (0.60): Post-FOMC bearish pattern (8/9 historical), 8-4 dissent adds policy uncertainty, $80K double rejection, two consecutive days ETF outflows, declining volume, Hormuz/oil headwinds, weak GDP nowcast. Confidence raised slightly from 0.58 to 0.60 post-FOMC confirmation and Powell bearish press conference tone. Macro filter ACTIVE (>=0.5). Prefer SHORT bias or cautious HOLD. Next reassessment after GDP release (Apr 30 12:30 UTC).
